title: Blechnum binervatum
taxonomy: Blechnum binervatum is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. This plant is native to Australia. It belongs to the genus Blechnum, which comprises about 50 species of ferns. The genus Blechnum is part of the family Blechnaceae, also known as the chain ferns. Blechnum binervatum is classified as a vascular plant, specifically a fern, and is characterized by its two-nerved pinnatifid fronds.
